events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six today! Ringo Starr, the man who kept the beat for the biggest band in history, is still going strong. What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the one and only Sir Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs to actual astrophysics, what an absolute legend. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Mick Jagger, the indefatigable force of The Rolling Stones, continues to defy time. What's your favourite Jagger move?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast music video.

angles.name: MTV's Legacy
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give it a new lease of life?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in UK history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and ignited Britpop. What's the track from that album that still gives you the biggest buzz?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a pivotal countercultural event, began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What's your favourite performance or memory from the iconic festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the one and only Elvis Presley. His music and legend live on. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, six days after being shot in a drive-by incident in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years today since the music world lost Tupac Shakur. His impact on hip-hop and culture remains immense. What's the Tupac track that still resonates most with you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Guitar icon Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi's Enduring Genius
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost Jimi Hendrix, a true pioneer of the electric guitar. His sound remains revolutionary. What's your favourite Jimi Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, featuring its famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From its timeless tracks to that legendary album cover, it's pure genius. What's your favourite song from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the lead singer and founding member of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie's Iconic Voice
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and fierce spirit have defined The Pretenders for decades. What's your go-to Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a formidable solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam's Swagger
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54 today! Liam Gallagher, forever the rock and roll star. What's your favourite Liam moment, from Oasis to his solo career?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace that still resonates today. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the original iPod dropped, giving us '1,000 songs in your pocket'. It changed everything. What was the first song you loaded onto your iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. What's your favourite Bond theme tune or iconic moment from the films?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and a legendary solo artist, would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Voice
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His songs continue to inspire generations worldwide. What's the John Lennon lyric that means the most to you?
